rewritten_requirements: The system shall display job listings from different fields.
The system shall allow searching job listings by location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility criteria.
The system shall enable registration of candidate profiles for company use in shortlisting.
The system shall provide filtering options based on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility criteria to assist candidates in narrowing down job search results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The platform should list job availability across various fields.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: a platform for listing out the availability of jobs irrespective of the field is required.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Job listings should be searchable by location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility criteria.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The objective is to develop a software solution to predict the availability of jobs based on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Candidates' profiles should be registered for companies to shortlist candidates.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: it serves as a database of registered candidate’s profiles for companies to shortlist.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The platform should provide facets on location, sectors, package, platform, interest and eligibility criteria to help candidates narrow down job search results.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: As it is important to keep the candidates engaged during their job search, it is important to provide facets on the abovementioned criteria so that they can narrow down to the jobs of their choice (Figures 22.1–22.8).
